mnemonics: L.I.P. T.R.A.V.E.L.S. - Logical, Inorder/Postorder/Preorder, Parent-Child, Tree, Root, Ancestors, Vertex/Node, Edges, Leaves, Subtrees
keyPoints: Pre-order traversal visits root first, then left subtree, then right subtree
In-order traversal visits left subtree, then root, then right subtree
Post-order traversal visits left subtree, then right subtree, then root
commonMistakes: Forgetting that tree operations require O(h) time where h is height, not O(n)
Confusing the order of operations in different traversal methods
Not handling edge cases like empty trees or single-node trees properly
